title: dahlia crocea
intro: Dahlia crocea, also known as the golden dahlia, is a species of flowering plant in the dahlia family that is native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of dahlia crocea include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve heart health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. In herbal preparations, dahlia crocea is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
